title: Most Emotional Eva Songs in your opinion
display_title: Most Emotional Eva Songs in your opinion
wikitext:
[]: Most Emotional Eva Songs, in your opinion             Quote Post by glitz2hard » Thu Aug 27, 2020 7:03 pm I don't just mean "saddest". Just overall, the most emotionally intense song for you. And while sad usually is an element of those songs, don't feel restricted to, like, Thanatos variants. For me it's either ED-1 (Type A) or Migawari no Shinyuu (yes, a Thanatos variant). Mostly because they really strongly invoke imagery of EoE. I can imagine this scene (play ED-1 Type A while reading this for the best result): The sky is red, like the water. Shinji is on the beach, gazing at starlight, with Asuka beside him. The rolling waves, laced with sea foam, and the cushioning sand sooth his aching mind. He’s at peace for the first time in days, maybe weeks. The hours of trauma and abuse wash off him, down the shore, and into the tide. Seeking warmth, Asuka lets Shinji pull her closer, and they look towards the sea. The moon and stars twinkle and dance upon the water, making the world appear beautiful once again. Just for a moment, he glimpses a girl, a girl he knew very well and who loved him dearly. She’s smiling at him for the last time. In that moment, their eyes meet, and they both understand they have to part ways. Swimming in bittersweet, he lies back down, reminded of those he lost. But before he falls asleep, he’s comforted by Rei, who’s singing him a familiar tune; “Fly me to the moon, and let me play amongst the stars...” (not gonna lie, it made my stomach hurt writing that. not because "mAn My WrItInG iS sO gOoD aNd SaD", but because THIS MOVIE MAKES MY HEART HURT) anyway, yea, emotional songs. also, shoutout to the best eva song, which is pretty damn bittersweet: Heisoku no Kakudai.

[]: Re: Most Emotional Eva Songs, in your opinion             Quote Post by Berserker » Fri Aug 28, 2020 12:16 am Tsubasa wo kudasai. Don't have any particular reason,listening to it makes me let out a sigh every time. Edit: Also "Those women longed for the touch of others' lips, and thus invited their kisses."(the background version of fly me to the moon in ep 15)
